creator: leifn@swimsuit.internet.dk
text:
EXT2FS should be in GENERIC kernel, so it is possible to 
	access linix-disks for repair and for upgrading to freebsd
	from linux when having downloaded distfiles to linux-disk.

Fix: 

Include EXT2FS in GENERIC
	At least make it an option between the other fs's
	(MSDOSFS, CD9660) in beginning of GENERIC conf, not hidden in 
	the bottom of LINT undocumented.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Boot from boot.img
